top_signals.title: EM Long Bonds Seen Missing Out on Any Iran Peace Dividend
top_signals.summary: Longer-term emerging-market bonds may miss out on any rally from a US-Iran deal as inflation and fiscal concerns will keep yields elevated, money managers say.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Odd Lots’ Hosts Discuss Stock Rout, AI Boom Winners | The China Show 6/8/2026
top_signals.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Stephen Engle give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The US Army wants thousands of air defense missiles to replace the Stinger
top_signals.summary: A new Army Request for Information seeks to identify companies that can deliver 11,000 next-gen, short range interceptors beginning in Fiscal Year 2028.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Truckload’s shrinking miles
top_signals.summary:
Supply chain adaptations have led to diminishing distances for truckloads. The shrinking length of haul has mitigated some of the recent market capacity shortfalls.

The post Truckload’s shrinking miles appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The American Military’s Coming Marathon
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon needs both quantity and quality to win modern conflicts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
